message:
fix: codegen correctness, crypto P-256, and Zig 0.15 compatibility

Codegen fixes (zig_codegen_full.zig):
- Add function_returned flag to track returns vs break/continue
- Fix memory leaks with vpopAndFree() and proper deinit cleanup
- Don't clear block_terminated after function returns
- Only emit latch code if body didn't terminate
- Set block_terminated after fallback blocks
- Update tests for self-recursive call patterns

Runtime additions:
- Add instanceof() and typeofValue() helpers (zig_runtime.zig)
- Fix polyfill prepend order - reverse iterate so core.js is first
- Link libbrotli for Brotli compression support (build.zig)

Crypto P-256 fixes (crypto.zig):
- Use EcdsaP256Sha256 for sign/verify (handles hashing internally)
- Fix pointer alignment with @alignCast
- Simplify ECDH using P256.fromSec1() directly

Zig 0.15 compatibility:
- Fix array literal in child_process.zig
- Explicit u16 cast for port in net.zig
- Rename vr to vrs in opcode_emitter.zig
